target_market_label.zh: 密克罗尼西亚联邦（资源与发展部/州公用事业）
target_market_label.zht: 密克羅尼西亞聯邦（資源與發展部/州公共事業）

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入密克罗尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入密克羅尼西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Federated States of Micronesia (FSM) Department of Resources and Development product-conformity context, state public utility interconnection practice in Pohnpei and Chuuk, US-aligned IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 / UL 9540 direction, BBSQ-equivalent standards pathway expectations, NFPA 855 fire-installation framework, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 120/240 V 60 Hz US-heritage NEMA-style grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与密克罗尼西亚联邦（FSM）国家资源与发展部（DRD）产品合格评定背景、波奈佩（Pohnpei）与楚克（Chuuk）州级公用事业公司并网实践、IEEE 1547/UL 1741/UL 9540美国体系方向、消防安装基准NFPA 855、UN 38.3运输要求及120/240 V 60 Hz美国沿袭型NEMA体系电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與密克羅尼西亞聯邦（FSM）國家資源與發展部（DRD）產品合格評定背景、波奈佩（Pohnpei）與楚克（Chuuk）州級公共事業公司併網實務、IEEE 1547/UL 1741/UL 9540 美國體系方向、消防安裝基準NFPA 855、UN 38.3 運輸要求及120/240 V 60 Hz 美國沿襲型NEMA體系電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DRD conformity scope determination, state-utility interconnection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current FSM standards and regulations, state utility technical requirements, applicable UL/IEEE/NFPA standards, UN transport regulations, and hurricane-coastal design requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DRD合格评定范围裁定、州级电力并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行FSM标准与规定、州公用事业技术要求、适用UL/IEEE/NFPA标准、UN运输法规及沿海飓风环境要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DRD合格評定範圍裁定、州級電力併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行FSM標準與規定、州公共事業技術要求、適用UL/IEEE/NFPA標準、UN運輸法規及沿海颶風環境要求。

answer_first.en: Micronesia presents a fundamentally different technical baseline from China for BESS exports. The most critical gap is the grid mismatch: FSM operations use a 120/240 V, 60 Hz US-aligned low-voltage grid context — versus China’s 220/380 V 50 Hz system. This means BESS power-conversion systems (PCS) designed and validated for China’s 50 Hz grid cannot be directly deployed in FSM; full 60 Hz revalidation is required. The practical compliance gates for Chinese BESS exported to FSM are: (1) UL 1973 (batteries for stationary applications) and UL 9540 / UL 9540A (energy storage system and fire test) as expected US/UL-direction evidence in the FSM project context; (2) IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 interconnection expectations for distributed energy resources including storage in 120/240 V / 60 Hz systems; (3) NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations for indoor and outdoor stationary BESS spacing and suppression evidence; (4) DRD and state utility conformity and installation oversight — verify the current regulated-product and project list directly with DRD and the state utility corporations, as no unified national BESS technical regulation was publicly identified in the provided baseline; (5) UN 38.3 transport documentation mandatory for all lithium battery sea freight via Pohnpei and onward inter-island movement; and (6) typhoon-resilience design because FSM is a tropical, cyclone-prone archipelago and many projects are on coastal sites. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 are the Chinese manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for UL or IEEE evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 对于BESS出口而言，密克罗尼西亚与中国的技术基准存在根本性差异。最关键差距在于电网不匹配：FSM是120/240 V、60 Hz的美国沿袭型低压电网——而中国为50 Hz/220/380 V系统。这意味着针对中国50 Hz电网设计和验证的BESS储能变流器（PCS）不能直接在FSM部署；须进行完整60 Hz重新验证。中国BESS出口FSM的实际合规门槛包括：（1）UL 1973（固定应用电池）及UL 9540/UL 9540A（储能系统及火灾测试）——在FSM项目环境下属于美国/UL方向的预期证据；（2）IEEE 1547和UL 1741并网方向，适用于含储能分布式能源；（3）NFPA 855消防安全安装要求；（4）DRD和州公用事业合格评定与安装监督——需直接向DRD和各州公用事业公司核实现行受管制产品及项目清单，截至目前未公开确认统一的全国性BESS技术法规；（5）UN 38.3运输文件要求——用于所有经由波奈佩（Pohnpei）并在离岛间转运的锂电池海运；（6）颶风韧性设计——FSM属热带飓风高风险群岛，许多项目位于沿海。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是制造基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为UL或IEEE证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 對於BESS出口而言，密克羅尼西亞與中國的技術基準存在根本性差異。最關鍵差距在於電網不匹配：FSM係120/240 V、60 Hz的美國沿襲型低壓電網——而中國為50 Hz/220/380 V系統。這意味著針對中國50 Hz電網設計和驗證的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）不能直接在FSM部署；須進行完整60 Hz重新驗證。中國BESS輸出FSM的實際合規門檻包括：（1）UL 1973（固定應用電池）及UL 9540/UL 9540A（儲能系統及火災測試）——在FSM項目環境下屬於美國/UL方向的預期證據；（2）IEEE 1547和UL 1741併網方向，適用於包含儲能的分佈式能源；（3）NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求；（4）DRD與州公共事業合格評定及安裝監督——需直接向DRD和各州公共事業公司核實現行受管制產品及項目清單，截至目前未公開確認統一的全國性BESS技術法規；（5）UN 38.3運輸文件要求——適用於所有經由波奈佩（Pohnpei）並在外島間轉運的鋰電池海運；（6）颶風韌性設計——FSM屬熱帶颶風高風險群島，許多項目位於沿海。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031及GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為UL或IEEE證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
